name: UTG INC
summary: UTG, Inc. is a Delaware-incorporated insurance holding company headquartered in Stanford, KY, whose principal subsidiary is Universal Guaranty Life Insurance Company (UG), an Ohio-domiciled life insurer licensed in 37 states. The Company's dominant business is individual life insurance, including servicing existing in-force business, acquiring other insurance companies, and administering life insurance for other entities. Products include whole life (Tradition) and a 5-year single premium annuity. UTG does not actively sell new policies currently.
